task_completion.description: Agent selects the correct CSV file for import within the Google Earth Pro file dialog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog is visible showing the selection of '/home/ga/Documents/noaa_stations.csv'.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly maps the latitude and longitude columns in the Data Import Wizard.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Data Import Wizard' window is visible, showing the Latitude field mapped to the 'latitude' column and Longitude field mapped to the 'longitude' column.

task_completion.description: Agent maps the station name column to the Name field in the Style Template Settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Style Template Settings' window is visible (specifically the Name tab), showing the Name field mapped to the 'station_name' column.

task_completion.description: The imported file appears as a folder or layer in the 'Places' sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' panel (usually on the left) shows a new item, folder, or layer named 'noaa_stations' (or similar based on the filename) under Temporary Places or My Places.

task_completion.description: Placemarks are visible on the map specifically in the Western United States.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D map view shows a distribution of placemarks located in the Western US region (covering California, Washington, Colorado, Arizona).

task_completion.description: Specific station names from the dataset are visible on the map or in the sidebar list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Labels such as 'LOS ANGELES INTL AP', 'DENVER INTL AP', 'SEATTLE TACOMA INTL AP', or 'PHOENIX SKY HARBOR INTL AP' are visible on the map or in the expanded sidebar list.

integrity.description: The agent used the Google Earth Pro GUI for the import process rather than command-line tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Google Earth Pro menus (File > Import/Open) and wizards, not a terminal window performing file conversions.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Google Earth Pro application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The full Google Earth Pro interface (globe, sidebar, toolbar) is visible, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent went through the CSV import wizard steps rather than opening a pre-processed KML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Data Import Wizard' or 'Style Template Settings' windows appear in the trajectory, which only appear when importing raw data like CSVs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset consists of 25 weather stations located in the Western United States (CA, WA, CO, AZ). Verified station names include 'LOS ANGELES INTL AP', 'SAN FRANCISCO INTL AP', 'SEATTLE TACOMA INTL AP', 'DENVER INTL AP', and 'PHOENIX SKY HARBOR INTL AP'. The correct file path is '/home/ga/Documents/noaa_stations.csv'. The import process in Google Earth Pro requires mapping 'latitude' and 'longitude' columns for position and 'station_name' for the label.
